focus: Last-call urgency: both remaining 7:11 PM ET plays, the +$2.19M career wallet on BOTH, fireworks framing.

hero_single.text:
Quick — before the fireworks. 🎆

8-4 yesterday. +47 units on the month. And the biggest career winner we track (+$2M lifetime) just fired on BOTH 7 o'clock games:

⚾ Orioles +109 — 7 proven winners, zero dissent, plus money
⚾ Astros ML — same wallet, 16× his usual size

First pitch 7:11 ET. Both lock on the site before then.

Get your plays in, then go watch the sky.

The sharps don't take holidays. Neither do we.

alt_hooks: One career +$2M winner. Two 7 o'clock games. He just fired on both — one at 16× his usual size.
45 minutes until first pitch. The sharpest wallet we track is already positioned on both games.

alternates.label: reply-before-reveal (engagement version)
alternates.text:
Before the fireworks: the biggest career winner we track (+$2M) just bet both 7:11 games.

Orioles +109 and Astros ML.

Which one are you locking before first pitch — or is it both?

We grade it tonight under the fireworks. 🎆
